title: BDS Jobs 2026 – Junior Consultant, Young Professional
shortInfo: ICMR National Institute of Health Research Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 12 vacancies for Project Human Resource Positions posts. Candidates can attend the walk-in interview from 28.05.2026 to 03.06.2026 as per the scheduled dates mentioned in the official notification.

basic_details.job_title: ICMR NIHR Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 12 Junior Consultant, Young Professional Posts
basic_details.organization_name: ICMR National Institute of Health Research
basic_details.short_information: ICMR National Institute of Health Research Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 12 vacancies for Project Human Resource Positions posts. Candidates can attend the walk-in interview from 28.05.2026 to 03.06.2026 as per the scheduled dates mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: All Posts: Age relaxation as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS or BDS or BVSc or equivalent degree, Post Graduate degree in Life Science Subjects/Public Health, Post Graduate, B.com/BBA
qualification.details: Junior Consultant (Medical): Professionals having proven competency and success in their area of specialization, with at least 6 years of Post qualification experience and should possess minimum MBBS or BDS or BVSc or equivalent degree in relevant subject. Young Professional-I (Public Health): Post Graduate degree in Life Science Subjects/Public Health. Young Professional-II (IT): Post Graduate in Technology / IT / Computer Science with 3 year experience. Young Professional-I (Admin): Graduate in any discipline with minimum 55% marks, from a recognized University/ College. (With minimum one year of post qualification experience in relevant field/subject). Young Professional-I (Accounts): B.com/BBA (With minimum 55% Marks) from a recognized University/College. (With minimum one year of post qualification experience in relevant field/subject).

faq.question: What is the total number of vacancies announced by ICMR NIHR?
faq.answer: ICMR NIHR has announced a total of 12 vacancies for Project Human Resource Positions.

faq.question: What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: What is the salary range for the Project Human Resource Positions?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 35,000 to Rs. 80,000 Per Month, depending on the post.

faq.question: Which posts are available in this recruitment drive?
faq.answer: The available posts include Junior Consultant (Medical), Young Professional-I (Public Health), Young Professional-II (IT), Young Professional-I (Admin), and Young Professional-I (Accounts).

faq.question: What are the minimum qualifications required for the Young Professional-I (Public Health) post?
faq.answer: A Post Graduate degree in Life Science Subjects or Public Health is required for the Young Professional-I (Public Health) post.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for ICMR NIHR recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories.

faq.question: What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting based on qualification and experience, followed by an interview and document verification.

faq.question: Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews will be held at ICMR National Institute of Health Research, Bhubaneswar, Odisha.

faq.question: What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: What is the last date for the walk-in interview for the Junior Consultant (Medical) post?
faq.answer: The last date for the walk-in interview for the Junior Consultant (Medical) post is 28 May 2026.

seo_tags: ICMR National Institute of Health Research Junior Consultant (Medical)
ICMR National Institute of Health Research Jobs 2026
